headline: Viatris Euro Debt Raise Reshapes Capital Structure And Valuation Story
summary: Viatris (NasdaqGS:VTRS) has completed a significant euro denominated fixed income offering through the issuance of senior unsecured notes. The transaction raises new capital for the company and introduces additional euro currency debt into its balance sheet. The offering follows a period of insider selling and debate around the company’s growth potential. Viatris, a global pharmaceutical company, operates across branded, generic, and biosimilar medicines, as well as over the counter...

headline: Viatris (VTRS) Stock And The 58% Undervaluation Debate After A Strong Year Of Returns
summary: What Viatris (VTRS) offers investors today Viatris (VTRS) has been drawing attention from investors after a strong total return over the past year, prompting fresh interest in how its current fundamentals line up with the stock price. The company reports annual revenue of US$14.56b and a reported net loss of US$296.5 million, alongside a value score of 5 and an intrinsic discount estimate of 66.78% relative to one assessment of fair value. See our latest analysis for Viatris. At a share price...
